content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be redesigned to grow their own episodic memory neural architectures on-demand, rather than using a fixed hand-designed memory bank, where curiosity-driven active sampling reshapes the agent's memory architecture to prioritize high-uncertainty encountered episodes for future planning. This structural adaptation creates a self-evolving memory system that aligns storage capacity with the informational value of stored episodes, rather than tying retention to recency or frequency.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
